description: You are a farm operations manager analyzing corn production across 15 Iowa counties for 2018-2022 using the spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/iowa_corn_production.xlsx. In the 'Field Data' sheet, calculate the yield (Production_Bu divided by Acres_Harvested) for all 75 data rows in a new column titled 'Yield_BuPerAcre'. Create a new sheet named 'County Summary' that lists the 15 counties (Black Hawk, Boone, Cerro Gordo, Dallas, Grundy, Hamilton, Hardin, Jasper, Kossuth, Marshall, Plymouth, Polk, Sioux, Story, Webster) alphabetically. For each county, calculate the average yield, best yield, worst yield, yield range, performance category, and rank (1-15). Performance categories are defined as: 'High' (Avg_Yield >= 205), 'Medium' (Avg_Yield >= 195 and < 205), and 'Low' (Avg_Yield < 195). Additionally, create a sheet named 'Statistics' summarizing the average, maximum, and minimum yields for each year from 2018 to 2022, including an 'Overall' row for the entire period. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/iowa_corn_production.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: USDA NASS QuickStats - Iowa Corn Production 2018-2022
